channel.title: The illumos project — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by The illumos project (illumos).

item.title: CVE-2026-15422 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SCTP needs to better-check INIT ACK chunk parameters
item.description: The illumos SCTP inbound path performs association lookup for INIT ACK chunks without adequately validating the address parameters carried in the chunk. Since this lookup runs during packet classification (i.e. before SCTP integrity checks or IPsec p…

item.title: CVE-2026-15449 · 5.8 MEDIUM — TOCTOU double copyin in illumos dld ioctl handling causes kernel heap corruption
item.description: A time-of-check to time-of-use (TOCTOU) flaw in the illumos data-link pseudo-driver (dld) affects handling of the DLDIOC_GETMACPROP and DLDIOC_SETMACPROP ioctls on /dev/dld. drv_ioc_prop_common() in usr/src/uts/common/io/dld/dld_drv.c copies the dld_…
